scripts.dev:full: concurrently -k "npm run dev" "cd .. && python -m uvicorn main:app --reload"
scripts.dev:full:5174: concurrently -k "npm run dev -- --port 5174" "cd .. && python -m uvicorn main:app --reload"
scripts.dev:full:5175: concurrently -k "npm run dev -- --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5175 --strictPort" "cd .. && python -m uvicorn main:app --reload"
